relations.note: The asymmetric signature radius applies to the button rendered within the gradient callout layout.

quotes: Always set a solid background-color of Sunshine #faa31b as fallback
Headline → Brand Blue #00529b, centered, sitting in the top third, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px

Button → centered, in the lower-middle below the headline. Fill Deep Blue #003D74, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold #FFC20E arrow › (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
Background → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning the full content width (600px).
Always set a solid background-color of Sunshine #faa31b as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images.
Headline → Brand Blue #00529b, centered, sitting in the top third, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.

Button → centered, in the lower-middle below the headline. Fill Deep Blue #003D74, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold #FFC20E arrow › (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.

rules.intent: Maintain branding integrity and visual layout for the featured gradient callout CTA block.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA section must feature a centered headline and single button stacked horizontally over a full-width branded gradient PNG. Always declare a fallback solid Sunshine background color (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b). The headline uses Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) in Nunito Sans 800 at 28px. The button features a Deep Blue fill (color.secondary.deep_blue = #003D74), a white label in Nunito Sans 800 at 18px, followed by a Gold (color.cta.gold_accent = #FFC20E) arrow '›' (24px) preceded by two non-breaking spaces. Standard button size is 248 x 64px.
rules.snippets: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯

quotes: Button radius (mandatory, never change): border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px; — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is always required on every instance, even when the background is skipped.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.
keep background-color="#faa31b" and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.intent: Maintain brand recognition through strict enforcement of the unique asymmetric signature button shape.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout button must use the asymmetric signature border-radius (gradient_banner.button.radius = 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px). This four-value asymmetric radius is mandatory, always required on every instance, and must never be simplified to a single value, have its corners swapped, or its decimals rounded, even when the background image is omitted.
